title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN SITIO LUGAN, BARANGAY POBLACION, MUNICIPALITY OF T'BOLI, PROVINCE OF SOUTH COTABATO, TO BE KNOWN AS THE T'BOLI NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

chunks.text:
H. No. 6337 / 90 OG No. 36, 5218 (Sept. 5, 1994)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7776, June 30, 1994 ]

AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN SITIO LUGAN, BARANGAY POBLACION, MUNICIPALITY OF T'BOLI, PROVINCE OF SOUTH COTABATO, TO BE KNOWN AS THE T'BOLI NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. There shall be established a national high school in Barangay Poblacion, Municipality of T'boli, Province of South Cotabato, to be known as the T'boli National High School.

SEC. 2. The Secretary of the Department of Education, Culture and Sports (DECS) shall issue and publish the necessary rules and regulations to implement the provisions of this Act.

SEC. 3. The amount necessary to carry out the provisions of this Act shall be funded out of the appropriations authorized by Republic Act No. 7663 for the Department of Education, Culture and Sports intended for the operational expenses of newly legislated high schools. Thereafter, the amount needed for its operation and maintenance shall be included in the annual General Appropriations Act.

SEC. 4. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Lapsed into law on June 30, 1994 without the President's signature, pursuant to Sec. 27(1), Article VI of the Constitution.
